productName: Honey Stixx - 2pk - Solventless Infused Preroll - Hash - Watermelon ZKZ X Kosher Kush
description: A indica pre-roll of Watermelon Zkittlez supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of tropical, tree fruit, and sweet, with settle-in, melt-into-the-couch ease. A little goes a long way.
